summary: No close, label, merge, or fix action is safe for this dedupe-only cluster. The closed representative #45577 remains historical evidence for the already-implemented fallback persistence fix; #67429 is a related open follow-up for null-as-clear cron payload override semantics and should stay open.

actions.reason: #67429 should not be closed as duplicate or superseded because it carries unique null-clear behavior and active review. Keep it open as related follow-up work; there is no open canonical replacement needed for the already-closed fallback-persistence representative.
